# .github

## Purpose
GitHub-specific configuration, primarily CI/CD workflows.

## Subdirectories

| Directory | Purpose |
|-----------|---------|
| `workflows/` | GitHub Actions workflow definitions (see `workflows/AGENTS.md`) |

## For AI Agents

### Working In This Directory
- Keep CI workflows minimal and focused. The project has zero external Go dependencies, so CI is straightforward.
